A: I saw a goldfish drying in the sun this morning, and by evening, someone had proposed to me.
B: This morning when I passed by, I saw a goldfish being dried in the sun, but when I returned this afternoon, I saw someone proposing.
C: This morning I walked past and just saw someone drying a goldfish in the sun, but by afternoon when I got back, I saw that someone had proposed already.

standard: Thấy con trai khóc mình thấy sung sướng thế nhỉ.
A: Seeing my son cry makes me feel so happy.
B: Seeing my son cry makes me feel so happy, doesn't it?
C: I feel so delighted seeing the boy cry, huh.

standard: phải nói là bánh căn ở đây đắt nức tiếng chứ ngon thì không nhé
A: I have to say, the banh can (rice flour pancakes) here are notoriously expensive, but they're not delicious.
B: I have to say that the bánh căn here is famous for being expensive, but not for being delicious.
C: I have to say, the bánh căn here is famous for being expensive, but it's not actually delicious though

standard: phải quán Vân Trang Cổ Cò rẽ vào không bạn
A: Is it the Van Trang Co Co restaurant that you turn off at?
B: Do I have to turn in at Van Trang Co Co restaurant?
C: Is it the Vân Trang restaurant at Cổ Cò that we turn into, right?

standard: sao hồi đầu giống em nhỉ?
A: Why did you look so much like me at first?
B: Why did it seem like me at first?
C: How come it was like me in the beginning?

standard: bảo mẹ mua ít về nấu mì chị.
A: I told Mom to buy some so we can cook noodles together.
B: Tell mom to buy some to cook noodles, sister.
C: Tell mom to buy some noodles for us to cook, sis.

standard: về quậy kẻo công an bắt nữa.
A: Go home and cause trouble, or the police will arrest you again.
B: Go back home and stop causing trouble, otherwise the police will arrest you again.
C: Let's stop messing around, or the police will arrest us again.

standard: Chia sẻ bài này cô à? Với ấn cái chữ xanh like theo dõi trang kia là được.
A: Please share this post, miss! And just click the blue "like" and "follow" button on that page.
B: Share this post, ma'am? Just click the blue "like" text to follow that page.
C: Share this post, Mom? And just press the blue like button and follow that page and you're good.

standard: Nhà bác ở đâu vậy các bạn?
A: Where does your uncle live, guys?
B: Where is the uncle's house, everyone?
C: Where is Uncle's/Aunt's house, everyone?

standard: sau này về quê lẹ lắm này chồng.
A: We'll be going back to our hometown very quickly later, husband.
B: In the future, we'll get back to our hometown very quickly, hubby.
C: Later I'll go back to my hometown really quickly, husband.

standard: làm một bộ ảnh với mẫu lại hay đấy nhỉ.
A: Doing a photoshoot with a model would be a great idea, wouldn't it?
B: Doing a photo shoot with the same model again would be a great idea, wouldn't it?
C: Taking another photo shoot with a model would be cool, huh.

standard: Về thằng này là không được rồi. Để anh em bàn lại cách sống cái, chứ nghe không ổn.
A: This guy is no good. Let's discuss how we should live our lives, because this doesn't sound right.
B: Regarding this guy, it's not going to work. Let us discuss how to handle this again, because this doesn't sound right.
C: This one's definitely not working out. Let's discuss that living arrangement again, because it doesn't sound right.

standard: Phải chi gặp được người để mình nhớ đến thế, bạn mình nhỉ.
A: I wish I could meet someone who would leave such a lasting impression, my friend.
B: If only I could meet someone to miss that much, wouldn't it be great, my friend?
C: I wish I could meet that person I miss so much, my friend.

standard: Thủy Tề của bạn đâu rồi.
A: Where is your Sea God?
B: Where is your Neptune?
C: Where's your Thủy Tề?

standard: Đen thật sự. Mới đầu năm mới mang xe ra nhà một cái bị mấy anh hỏi thăm luôn.
A: What bad luck. Right at the beginning of the new year, I took my car out of the garage and the police started questioning me.
B: Really unlucky. Just brought my bike out of the house at the start of the new year and immediately got stopped by the police.
C: Really unlucky. I just brought my car out at the start of the new year and immediately got questioned by some guys.

standard: Tỉnh là phải chối chứ sao.
A: The province has no choice but to deny it.
B: If you're awake, you have to deny it, right?
C: Being cool means you have to deny it, right? What else?

standard: Có không để biết tìm người yêu bên Đắk Lắk này.
A: Is it possible to find a lover in Dak Lak?
B: Is there any way to know how to find a lover here in Đắk Lắk?
C: Is there a way to find a girlfriend/boyfriend here in Đắk Lắk?

standard: hôm nào tới chỗ của chúng mày đấy.
A: I'll come to your place sometime.
B: One of these days, I'll come to your place.
C: Some day I'll come over to your guys' place.

standard: Công ty này làm gì, đăng lên cho có ạ?
A: What does this company actually do? Is it just for show?
B: What does this company actually do, or are they just posting for the sake of it?
C: What does this company even do, just posting for the sake of having something there?

standard: đầu đường vào nhà chị đấy. Bà con gần với mình đấy nhóc.
A: That's at the beginning of the street leading to her house. She's a close relative of ours, kid.
B: It's at the beginning of the road to my house. They are relatives of ours, kid.
C: It's at the beginning of the road leading to chị's house. They're relatives close to me, kid.

standard: Trên cả tuyệt vời. Khi nào đến giờ mới thấy một bác sĩ.
A: Absolutely amazing. When will I ever see a doctor like this?
B: Beyond wonderful. It took so long before I finally saw a doctor.
C: Absolutely wonderful. When do I get to see a doctor?

standard: Chỉ mang tính chất minh họa thôi, chứ mùa này sen đào đâu ra.
A: This is just for illustrative purposes; there are no lotus flowers or peach blossoms available this season.
B: This is just for illustration purposes, because there are no lotuses available this season.
C: Just for illustration purposes only, because this isn't the season for lotus and peach blossoms.

standard: Mình nhớ bà nội lắm rồi !
A: I miss my grandmother so much!
B: I miss my paternal grandmother so much already!
C: I miss my grandmother so much already!

standard: Lo việc dân đảm việc nhà thế này mà vợ bảo không được tích sự gì cả
A: I'm juggling public affairs and household chores like this, and my wife says I'm not doing anything useful.
B: I take care of public affairs and handle the housework like this, yet my wife says I'm useless.
C: I'm taking care of both civic duties and household responsibilities like this, yet my wife says I haven't accomplished anything useful at all.
